title: Automations on templates for folder movement and naming

posts.author: Bridget1 (Bridget McDonald)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

When a board is created from a project template, move it to a specific folder - not just a workspace - and name both the project board and the resource planner the same as the new template name. Currently only the top level folder carries the new name across.

What are you trying to achieve

We need the new folder - with the project board and resource planner - to be the second level folder in an existing folder. We want them to appear in the selected folder with their new names. Currently we have to find where the board landed in the new workspace, move it up and rename the board and resource planner to match the folder it was created in.
